title: Wisteria sinensis 'Amethyst' – Fragrant Flowering Vine for Pergolas and Walls, Violet Purple Blooms, Grafted Plant, Easy to Grow, Hardy Climber - 1x 3 Litre Potted Plant by Thompson & Morgan
features: Fragrant violet-purple flowers appear before foliage in late spring.
Grafted plant ensures robust and vigorous growth.
Perfect for covering walls, pergolas, and large garden spaces.
Easy to grow in moist, well-drained soil with regular feeding and watering.
description: Discover the enchanting beauty of Wisteria sinensis 'Amethyst,' a stunning cultivar of Chinese Wisteria known for its captivating fragrance and vibrant violet-purple racemes. These breathtaking flowers bloom slightly before the foliage in late spring, providing a mesmerizing display that will elevate any garden space. The pinnate leaves emerge with a delicate bronze flush, maturing into a handsome green covering perfect for walls, pergolas, and arbors. This vigorous climber reaches heights of up to 12 meters (40 feet) and spreads up to 8 meters (26 feet), making it an excellent choice for creating a lush, vertical garden. Supplied as a grafted plant, Wisteria sinensis 'Amethyst' thrives in sunny or semi-shaded sites with moist, well-drained soil. Ensure your plant's success by choosing a sheltered position to protect the buds from hard spring frosts and providing sturdy support for the twining stems. Regular feeding and watering will help establish your plant, while seasonal mulching with well-rotted manure or compost will promote healthy growth. With its show-stopping blooms and robust growth. How to Grow Instructions: Light: Plant in a sunny or semi-shaded location. Temperature: Protect from hard spring frosts; thrives in temperate climates. Watering: Water regularly until established; keep soil moist but well-drained. Feeding: Apply a mulch of well-rotted manure or compost in autumn or spring. Humidity: Tolerates average humidity; ensure good air circulation. Images shown are for guidance only and show the expected results of plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months). Decor pots are not supplied.
